title: lindernia subcrenulata
intro: Lindernia subcrenulata, also known as the creeping fimbry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Linderniaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and inflammation. The health benefits of Lindernia subcrenulata include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can help reduce pain and fever. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
